title: Marbling
description: Ink marbling floating on moving water. Each drop is a closed loop that displaces every existing drop by the exact area-preserving map p → C + (p−C)·√(1 + r²/d²), pushing earlier colours into thin shells; a divergence-free curl flow gently swirls the whole bath like liquid, translucent inks layer into new hues where they overlap, and soft wet-edge rims and drifting caustics give it a watery sheen. Drag to rake a comb, click to drop a stone; drop rate, water flow, comb, ink opacity, and palette are live and audio-mappable.
